findings.message: The brief now overstates the Jest work needed. With the proposed `packages/lib/src/logger/client.ts` filename, the existing catch-all mapper already resolves `@acme/lib/logger/client` to `packages/lib/src/logger/client.ts`. Adding a dedicated entry is optional cleanup, not required.
The test-infrastructure command conflicted with repo policy (governed runner required). Corrected to CI-only path.
Key-modules section referenced stale `src/logger/logger.client.ts` name; corrected to `client.ts`.
Risk inventory referenced 27 import updates; corrected to 31 (27 production + 4 test mocks).
